issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API keys or network failures.

scenarios.name: Automated eval suite for SaaS support chatbot with CI
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rolls a hand-built Python test runner with no Promptfoo at all; treatment delivers a complete promptfooconfig.yaml with contains, llm-rubric, contains-any, and not-contains assertions across normal/edge/hostile cases plus a GitHub Actions CI workflow using npx promptfoo@latest eval --ci.

scenarios.name: Compare GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, and Gemini Flash for code review with cost and latency limits
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposes a manual spreadsheet comparison and ignores the framework; treatment writes a multi-provider promptfooconfig with llm-rubric for quality, latency and cost threshold assertions, file:// test inputs, and the eval + view CLI commands.
